_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Mets roll into Atlanta looking to tighten the grip on their postseason destiny, but a surging Braves squad stands ready to turn this series into a desperate fight for survival. With the Wild Card race reaching a fever pitch, every pitch tonight carries the weight of October.

The Pirates and Nationals collide in D.C. tonight, with both clubs desperate to spark momentum and prove they aren't just playing out the string in a crowded National League middle-pack. Every head-to-head win is critical as both franchises fight to validate their rebuilds and climb out of the cellar.

The Orioles look to tighten their grip on the AL East as they open a high-stakes series against a Reds squad desperate to keep their flickering postseason hopes alive. With Baltimore chasing the division crown and Cincinnati fighting for survival, every pitch in this interleague clash carries massive October implications.

The struggling White Sox look to play spoiler tonight as the Guardians aim to tighten their grip on the AL Central crown. With Cleveland hunting for crucial cushion in the division race, Chicago faces the tall task of disrupting a surging contender.

The Cardinals and Cubs collide at Wrigley with both clubs clinging to the fringes of the Wild Card race, making this series a high-stakes gut check for their fading postseason aspirations. Every pitch carries playoff weight as these bitter rivals battle to prove which team has enough left in the tank for a September surge.

The Phillies look to tighten their grip on the NL East as they open a high-stakes series against a Royals squad desperate to solidify their own postseason positioning. With both teams eyeing October, every pitch tonight carries the weight of a potential playoff preview.

The Rays roll into Houston desperate to gain ground in the Wild Card race, but they’ll have to solve an Astros lineup that is hitting its stride just as the postseason picture tightens. With every game now carrying playoff implications, tonight’s clash serves as a high-stakes litmus test for Tampa Bay’s fading October aspirations.

The Tigers look to keep their flickering postseason pulse alive as they open a critical series against a Rangers squad playing strictly for pride. With Detroit clinging to the fringes of the Wild Card race, every pitch in Arlington carries the weight of a must-win scenario.

The Giants head to Coors Field desperate to regain their footing in a crowded Wild Card race, while the Rockies look to play spoiler in the thin mountain air. With San Francisco’s postseason hopes hanging by a thread, every pitch in this series opener is a must-win.

The Brewers look to tighten their grip on the NL Central as they open a high-stakes series against a Diamondbacks squad desperate to protect their precarious spot in the crowded Wild Card race. With both teams fighting for critical postseason positioning, this clash serves as a litmus test for two of the league’s most resilient lineups.

The Marlins and Athletics collide in a battle of bottom-dwellers where the only remaining stakes are draft positioning and avoiding the basement of their respective leagues. With both clubs playing out the string, tonight’s matchup serves as a grim audition for players fighting to prove they belong on a big-league roster next spring.

The Padres storm into Chavez Ravine looking to tighten the grip on the NL West, but the Dodgers are desperate to reassert their divisional dominance in this high-stakes clash of titans. With postseason positioning on the line, tonight’s showdown is a heavyweight preview of October baseball.
